sourceMovie.title: G20
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit G20 for the same reason it broke through in 2025: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a mystery rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Patricia Riggen keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Logan
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If G20 clicked for you, Logan (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and drama, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after G20?
faq.answer: Try Logan, Knowing, White House Down—each shares DNA with G20 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is G20?
faq.answer: G20 (2025) is best described as Action, Mystery, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is G20 worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.4/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
